title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ajio - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ajio - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ajio. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Ajio:
Ajio is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio!
